name: AutoCrew
description: AI content operations crew — research, write, and publish on autopilot. Free: full workflow for XHS + Douyin. Pro: deep crawling, competitor monitoring, analytics, TTS, digital human.

pro_api_key.description: Pro API key for advanced features (deep crawling, competitor monitoring, analytics, TTS). Get one at autocrew.dev/activate

cdp_proxy_url.description: [Pro] Browser CDP proxy URL for platform crawling (default: http://127.0.0.1:3456)

gemini_api_key.description: Gemini API key for cover image generation. Free at aistudio.google.com/apikey

gemini_model.description: Image generation model: 'auto' (default, tries gemini-native then imagen-4), 'gemini-native', or 'imagen-4'
